title: draba verna subsp. stenocarpa
intro: Draba verna subsp. stenocarpa, also known as the alpine whitlowgrass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. The herbal preparations of Draba verna subsp. stenocarpa typically involve drying the plant material and using it in infusions, teas, or as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
